# ControlPlanePort Boundary

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerruntimeboundarydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to runtime actor boundary](../runtime-actor-boundary.md)

`internal/agentbridge/controlplane` is the provider-neutral daemon port contract between supervisor and task source/reporter adapters.

## Root Package Responsibilities

- `TaskSourcePort`: runtime registration, deregistration, heartbeat, task claim, and cancellation watch port.
- `TaskReporterPort`: task start, normalized event, and terminal result reporting port.
- `TaskReportContext`: claim-time lease metadata carried through reporter context.
- `MemorySource` and `MemoryReporter`: RAM-only test and offline implementations.
- `FileQueueSource`: top-level JSON task files, atomic claim, claim receipt, and runtime registry record.
- `FileReporter`: task-scoped JSONL report record writer.

## Nonresponsibilities

- Supervisor polling loop, runtime selection, and slot scheduling.
- `runtimeactor` session handoff and process execution.
- `controlplane/saasplane` HTTP polling and event sync adapter.
- Task DB source/reporter adapters outside the root package.
- `riidoaiserver`, local API, project persistence, packaging, infra, and secrets.
